changeCounts.title: Change counts
changeCounts.description: Per-Package tally of the Records feeding the bump. `breaking` counts feat! and fix! together (independent of the Unstable cap).

records.description: Record filenames feeding this bump, sorted lexicographically.

items.title: Constraint update
items.description: A dependent Package whose constraint on the bumped Package will be rewritten. When dv can resolve the dependency graph (the plugin implements `get-dependencies`) this lists only real dependents; for packages whose plugin lacks that op, dv falls back to listing them as candidates and the plugin filters at execute time via `changed: false`.

constraintUpdates.description: Dependents whose constraint may be rewritten when this Package bumps. The plugin filters per-manifest at execute time.

items.title: Pending bump
items.description: What `dv version` would do for one Package: the aggregated Bump, projected Version, change counts, and the Records feeding it.

pending.description: Per-Package bumps that `dv version` would apply.

tag.description: The Tag that would be minted.

firstStable.description: True if this would be the Package's first 1.0.0 (celebrated). False otherwise; never absent.

releaseNotes.description: The CHANGELOG release-notes body for this Version (heading dropped), extracted from the Package's CHANGELOG.md. Empty string when no section was found; never absent.

items.title: Awaiting-release entry
items.description: A Package whose current Version has no Tag — what `dv release` would tag, with its CHANGELOG release notes.

awaitingRelease.description: Packages whose current Version has no Tag.

record.description: Filename of the Record carrying the reference.

reference.description: The package name as written in the Record.

items.title: Unresolved Reference
items.description: A Record references a Package that no discovery plugin claims and no rename ledger edge maps to. Halts `dv version` unless --prune.

unresolvedReferences.description: Records pointing at no current Package (halt `dv version` unless --prune).

items.title: Tracked package
items.description: A Package discovery resolved and whose current Version the read-version Op returned. Lists every Package dv is aware of, regardless of whether any Records are pending against it.

tracked.description: Every Package discovery resolved, with its current Version. Independent of `pending` — populated even when no Records are queued.

title: dv Plan
description: The side-effect-free Plan emitted by `dv status --json` and `dv version|release --dry-run --json`. A pure function of repo state (specs/language.md Algebra §7).
